CustomField.formula: if(leaseworks__Payment__c!=null && ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Payment__r.leaseworks__Payment_Type__c,'Paid via Payable Offset'), HYPERLINK( '/'+ leaseworks__Payment__r.leaseworks__Event_claim_payable__c, leaseworks__Payment__r.leaseworks__Event_claim_payable__r.Name ,"_blank"),if(leaseworks__Payment__c!=null && ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Payment__r.leaseworks__Payment_Type__c,'Paid via SD Offset'), HYPERLINK( '/'+ leaseworks__Payment__r.leaseworks__Cash_Security_Deposit__c, leaseworks__Payment__r.leaseworks__Cash_Security_Deposit__r.Name ,"_blank"), null ))
CustomField.label: Applied To Payable
